en.metaDescription: Global Hub - Connect to the world's best information. Break free from information bubbles with 100+ curated high-quality websites across AI, tech, knowledge, design, tools, and more.
en.heroTitle: Connect to the World's Best Information
en.heroSubtitle: Break free from information bubbles. Discover 100+ most valuable websites across 10 categories, curated for the curious mind.
en.footerText: Built for information equality. Open source on
en.tryDifferentKeywords: Try different keywords or browse categories
en.bangTip: Tip: Use !g for Google, !gh for GitHub, !yt for YouTube, !wiki for Wikipedia

zh.heroTitle: 连接世界最优质的信息
zh.heroSubtitle: 打破信息茧房，10 大分类 100+ 精选网站，为好奇心探索全球最有价值的信息。
